calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Shelley Buchanan, Esq., appearing for defendant. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by plaintiff or plaintiff's counsel or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed as to entire action at Order to Show Cause Hearing Dec-19-2023 at 10:30 am. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Guandique. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance.
Plaintiff's counsel and defendant's counsel are sanctioned $400.00 each for failure to appear. Arbitration Order to Show Cause is re-set to November 14, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610.

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
